_doc: Data dictionary metadata for nmaipy export columns. PM-editable. See nmaipy/column_metadata.py for the loader. Sentinel '?' values mark cells where a definition is intentionally not yet provided.

aoi_id.description: Property identifier. If the input file had an `aoi_id` column it is preserved; otherwise generated from row index (0-indexed).

mesh_date.description: Date of the 3D mesh used for 3D attributes (height, pitch, etc.). The mesh is usually comprised of a number of overlapping surveys captured at a similar time of year, so this date represents that capture window rather than a single survey.

system_version.description: Base AI model version used for detection (applies to all columns with source = 'base ai model'). Example: `gen6-glowing_moon-1.0`. See https://help.nearmap.com/kb/articles/1629-generation-6-ai-content for details.

link.description: URL to view this row in Nearmap MapBrowser. Per-class files (roof, building, etc.) frame the URL on each feature's centroid; the rollup frames it on the parcel.

streetAddress.description: Street address from input (used for address-based API queries).

city.description: City from input (used for address-based API queries).

state.description: State from input (used for address-based API queries).

zip.description: ZIP/postal code from input (used for address-based API queries).

query_aoi_lat.description: Representative latitude of the query AOI geometry.

query_aoi_lon.description: Representative longitude of the query AOI geometry.

lat.description: Input latitude used for primary feature selection.

lon.description: Input longitude used for primary feature selection.

roof_spotlight_index.description: Roof Spotlight Index — roof condition score. 100 = best condition, 0 = worst condition.

primary_roof_spotlight_index.description: Roof Spotlight Index of the primary roof on the parcel (with Building Lifecycle fallback when structural damage is present). 100 = best condition, 0 = worst condition.

primary_roof_spotlight_index_confidence.description: Confidence in the primary roof's Roof Spotlight Index.

dominant_roof_material_feature_class.description: Feature class UUID of the dominant roof material. Dominant = highest-ratio component; UNKNOWN (null) when ratio < 0.5.

dominant_roof_material_description.description: Snake_case name of the dominant material feature class (`unknown` when ratio < 0.5). Open-ended; consult the Feature API class registry for the full list of possible values.

dominant_roof_material_area_{unit}.description: Area of the dominant material component on the primary roof.

dominant_roof_material_ratio.description: Ratio of the dominant material relative to total roof area.

dominant_roof_material_confidence.description: Confidence in the dominant material classification.

dominant_roof_types_feature_class.description: Feature class UUID of the dominant roof shape. Dominant = highest-ratio component; UNKNOWN (null) when no detected area.

dominant_roof_types_description.description: Snake_case name of the dominant shape feature class (`unknown` when no detected area). Open-ended; consult the Feature API class registry for the full list of possible values. Excludes deprecated flat roof and `shed`.

dominant_roof_types_area_{unit}.description: Area of the dominant shape component on the primary roof.

dominant_roof_types_confidence.description: Confidence in the dominant shape classification.

defensible_space_model_version.description: Version of the defensible space model used.

roof_age_as_of_date.description: Reference date for age calculation. When --until is set, this is the requested cutoff (clamped to the dataset's nearest snapshot date).

roof_age_until_date.description: The original requested cutoff (`untilAsOfDate`) before snapshot clamping. Differs from `roof_age_as_of_date` when the requested cutoff fell between dataset snapshots; null when no historical cutoff was applied.

roof_age_years_as_of_date.description: Calculated roof age in years (as_of_date − installation_date).

roof_age_trust_score.description: Reliability of age estimate (higher = more reliable).

roof_age_evidence_type.description: How age was determined (numeric code; see evidence_type_legend in README.md).

roof_age_map_browser_url.description: URL to view roof age timeline in MapBrowser.

roof_age_model_version.description: Version of the roof age prediction model used.

roof_age_kind.description: Type of estimate. One of `roof` (roof section) or `parcel` (property-level). Parcel-level estimates are only provided when no imagery is available.

roof_age_relevant_permits.description: Whether relevant building permits were used in determining roof age.

roof_age_relevant_permits_details.description: Details of relevant building permits (present when permits used in determining roof age).

roof_age_assessor_data.description: Whether assessor records (year built) were used in determining roof age.

roof_age_assessor_data_details.description: Details of assessor (year built) records (present when records were used in determining roof age).

class_id.description: AI feature class UUID for this row.

description.description: Human-readable name of this feature's class.

geometry.description: Feature geometry. WKT in CSVs, native GeoParquet geometry in `_features.parquet`.

parent_id.description: Feature ID of this feature's parent in the API hierarchy. For the new Building class, this points to the Building Lifecycle ancestor.

is_primary.description: Whether this feature is the parcel's primary feature for its class — selected by {primary_strategy_description} (see README → Primary Feature Selection).

confidence.description: Confidence in detection of the {class_label_primary} (single feature, not combined).

fidelity.description: Quality of the shape of the vectorized footprint polygon (and implicitly the accuracy of the area measurement).

has_3d_attributes.description: Boolean indicator of whether 3D attribute data from Nearmap is available for this record.

pitch_degrees.description: Predominant roof pitch in degrees, from 3D data. Building-level pitch is identical to roof pitch.

survey_date.description: Capture date of the 2D aerial imagery this feature was extracted from. Use as the canonical 'as-of' date for AI-derived attributes (counts, areas, materials, RSI, damage). May differ from mesh_date when 3D attributes draw on a different survey window.

survey_resource_id.description: UUID of the specific imagery resource (the model dataset within a survey) that produced this row. Use this when reproducibility matters; survey_id can resolve to different resources over time as the API team publishes corrections.

geocode_source.description: Source of the geocoded coordinates for an address-based query.

clipped_area_{unit}.description: Area of the {class_label_primary} clipped to the parcel boundary, in {unit_name}.

unclipped_area_{unit}.description: Total area of the {class_label_primary} before parcel clipping, in {unit_name}.

resource_id.description: Identifier of the AI resource (model dataset) that produced this row.

parent_building_id.description: Feature ID of the building this roof spatially matches, linked by IoU (Intersection over Union) overlap.

parent_building_iou.description: IoU (Intersection over Union) score with the parent building (≥0.005 to assign).

parent_iou.description: IoU (Intersection over Union) score with the parent feature (≥0.005 to assign).

primary_child_roof_id.description: Feature ID of this building's primary child roof — highest IoU (Intersection over Union) above the linkage threshold.

primary_child_roof_iou.description: IoU (Intersection over Union) between this building and its primary child roof.

primary_child_roof_age_feature_id.description: Feature ID of the roof age instance linked to this roof — highest IoU (Intersection over Union) above 0.005.

primary_child_roof_age_iou.description: IoU (Intersection over Union) between this roof and its primary linked roof age instance.

child_roofs.description: JSON list of all roofs linked to this building, sorted by IoU (Intersection over Union) descending. Each item: `{feature_id, iou}`.

child_roof_instances.description: JSON list of all roof age instances linked to this roof, sorted by IoU (Intersection over Union) descending. Each item: `{feature_id, iou, kind}`.

child_roof_instance_count.description: Count of linked roof age instances.

damage_class.description: Most-likely damage class for this Building Lifecycle feature.

since.description: Earliest survey date filter for the query (per-AOI override of the bulk --since flag).

until.description: Latest survey date filter for the query (per-AOI override of the bulk --until flag). Also drives Roof Age `untilAsOfDate` when --roof-age is set with an A.1+ dataset.

survey_id.description: UUID of the logical survey from which AI features were drawn. Pairs with survey_date. Multiple resource versions can share one survey_id; use survey_resource_id for an exact reproducible reference to the model output.

postcat.description: Whether the resource was tagged as a post catastrophe survey.

feature_api_success.description: Whether the Feature API call succeeded for this AOI.

roof_age_api_success.description: Whether the Roof Age API call succeeded for this AOI.

internal_class_id.description: Internal class ID used by the Feature API for downstream linkage; not customer-facing.

attributes.description: Raw API attributes payload for this feature (used during processing; preserved on raw feature outputs).

damage.description: Raw API damage payload for Building Lifecycle features (used by damage flattening).

belongs_to_parcel.description: Whether this feature is contained within (rather than spanning beyond) the AOI parcel.

multiparcel_feature.description: Whether the {class_label_primary} is also detected on at least one other parcel (e.g. a roof or building spanning a row of townhomes). 'Y' indicates this feature is shared across multiple parcels.

is_footprint.description: Whether this feature is a building footprint.

aoi_geometry.description: Original AOI geometry (preserved on grid-failure error rows for context).

patterns.description: Combined confidence that at least one {feature_class} was detected on the parcel — higher when multiple high-confidence detections agree. Null when none are detected.
Total area of defensible-space zone {zone_id} ({zone_band} from the structure) {ds_scope_phrasing}. In {unit_name}.
Clear/defensible area within defensible-space zone {zone_id} ({zone_band} from the structure) {ds_scope_phrasing} — area free of vegetation, buildings and yard debris. In {unit}.
Fraction of defensible-space zone {zone_id} ({zone_band} from the structure) {ds_scope_phrasing} that is defensible (clear of vegetation, buildings and yard debris).
Total area of all risk objects (vegetation, neighbouring roofs, yard debris, etc.) within defensible-space zone {zone_id} ({zone_band} from the structure) {ds_scope_phrasing}. In {unit_name}.
Area of {risk_class} within defensible-space zone {zone_id} ({zone_band} from the structure) {ds_scope_phrasing}. In {unit_name}.
Ratio of {risk_class} area to total zone area within defensible-space zone {zone_id} ({zone_band} from the structure) {ds_scope_phrasing}.
Value of {feature} used as input to the {peril} vulnerability score model.
{Peril} vulnerability score of {primary_phrasing}. 1 = most vulnerable, 5 = least vulnerable.
Raw model probability from the {peril} vulnerability model. This probability is binned into the 1-5 {peril} vulnerability score.
{Peril} risk score of {primary_phrasing}. 1 = highest risk, 5 = lowest risk.
Value of {feature} used as input to the wind/hail risk score model for {primary_phrasing}.
Rate factor corresponding to the {peril} {kind} score for {primary_phrasing}, as per Nearmap's approved regulatory filings.
Estimated annual frequency of {peril} at the location of {primary_phrasing}, according to the FEMA National Risk Index (version reported in {peril}_fema_version).
Version of the FEMA National Risk Index used to derive {peril}-related risk fields. Sourced from the API response field femaVersion on each {peril} score block.
Model version for {score}.
Minimum {score} across all roofs on the parcel.
Maximum {score} across all roofs on the parcel.
Area-weighted mean {score} across all roofs on the parcel (weighted by each roof's clipped area).
Ground elevation in {length_unit}, from 3D data.
Height of building above ground in {length_unit}, from 3D data.
Total area of {class} detected {scope_phrase}, in {unit_name}.
Count of {class} features on this parcel that are also detected on at least one other parcel (e.g. row-home features whose footprint spans multiple parcels).
Fraction of {pool_subject} detected to be {condition_phrase}.
Count of {class} detections {scope_phrase}.
Whether any {class} is detected {scope_phrase}.
Ratio of {class} detected {scope_phrase}.
Boolean indicator of whether {dominant_subject} is predominantly {class}.

Confidence in {class} classification {scope_phrase}. When multiple detections contribute: top-level feature classes on the parcel (e.g. all roofs, all vegetation segments) are combined so confidence rises with corroborating detections; sub-attributes within a parent feature (e.g. staining on a roof) take the maximum across detections. Null when the corresponding area is 0.
Feature ID of the primary {class} {scope_phrase}.

defensible_space_zone_distances._doc: Defensible space zoneId → distance band around the structure. Used by patterns to substitute {zone_band} in descriptions. Edit here if the API team changes the zone definitions.

evidence_type_legend._doc: Roof age evidence_type code → human-readable description. Source: https://help.nearmap.com/kb/articles/1811-evidence-type-and-trust-score. Used by roof_age_evidence_type allowed_values and the README evidence-type legend.
evidence_type_legend.0: No unobscured images of the roof or parcel and no relevant building permits or assessor year-built data. No roof installation date is provided.
evidence_type_legend.1: (Future Release) No unobscured images and no relevant permits/assessor data, but aggregated supporting evidence from the area indicates the likely age of roofs nearby.
evidence_type_legend.2: No unobscured images of the roof or parcel, but relevant building permits and/or assessor year-built data provide an indication of the installation date.
evidence_type_legend.3: A single unobscured image of the roof. Roof change cannot be detected; a machine-learning model predicts the age from the image plus other sources (e.g. climate data). No supporting evidence corroborating the date.
evidence_type_legend.4: A single unobscured image of the roof (ML-predicted age, as in Type 3), with relevant building permits and/or assessor year-built data supporting the predicted installation date.
evidence_type_legend.5: Multiple unobscured images of the roof, no roof change detected between captures. A separate ML model predicts the age from imagery plus other sources. No supporting evidence corroborating the date.
evidence_type_legend.6: Multiple unobscured images of the roof, no roof change detected (ML-predicted age, as in Type 5), with relevant building permits and/or assessor year-built data supporting the predicted installation date.
evidence_type_legend.7: Multiple unobscured images of the roof. AI model detects a roof change between two captures; installation date is set as the mid-point of those captures. No supporting evidence corroborating the date.
evidence_type_legend.8: Multiple unobscured images of the roof, with detected roof change (mid-point installation date, as in Type 7), with relevant building permits and/or assessor year-built data supporting the predicted installation date.
